/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -march=native -flto -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/kctboy.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kctboy.dir/src/GB/GB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kctboy.dir/src/CPU/CPU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kctboy.dir/src/CPU/ops/CPU_0_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kctboy.dir/src/CPU/ops/CPU_1_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kctboy.dir/src/CPU/ops/CPU_2_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kctboy.dir/src/CPU/ops/CPU_3_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kctboy.dir/src/CPU/ops/CPU_cb_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kctboy.dir/src/MMU/MMU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kctboy.dir/src/PPU/PPU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kctboy.dir/src/APU/APU.cpp.o -o kctboy  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libSDL3.so.0.5.0
